title: crataegus calpodendron var. mollicula
intro: Crataegus calpodendron var. mollicula, also known as the Chinese hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn tree, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its cardiotonic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to improve cardiovascular health, lower blood pressure, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Crataegus calpodendron var. mollicula include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. It can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
